contracts: legacy creator profile remains the global inheritance source
one isolated override per Instagram account
all browser mutations validate auth.uid and account ownership
automatic news, recurring topics and one-off posts use the effective account profile
AI cache keys include the creator profile fingerprint
forbidden terms are deterministically blocked before delivery
rollback: Redeploy the previous frontend and three Edge Functions; keep the additive account-scoped schema inert until a corrective migration can preserve account profiles safely.
